tEn: RDT-1B: a Diffusion Foundation Model for Bimanual Manipulation
tZh: RDT-1B：面向双臂操作任务的扩散基础模型
sEn: RDT-1B is a diffusion foundation model for bimanual manipulation that achieves zero-shot generalization and few-shot learning.
sZh: RDT-1B是一个面向双臂操作任务的扩散基础模型，实现了零样本泛化和少样本学习。
absEn: Bimanual manipulation is essential in robotics, yet developing foundation models is extremely challenging due to the inherent complexity of coordinating two robot arms (leading to multi-modal action distributions) and the scarcity of training data. In this paper, we present the Robotics Diffusion Transformer (RDT), a pioneering diffusion foundation model for bimanual manipulation. RDT builds on diffusion models to effectively represent multi-modality, with innovative designs of a scalable Transformer to deal with the heterogeneity of multi-modal inputs and to capture the nonlinearity and high frequency of robotic data. To address data scarcity, we further introduce a Physically Interpretable Unified Action Space, which can unify the action representations of various robots while preserving the physical meanings of original actions, facilitating learning transferrable physical knowledge. With these designs, we managed to pre-train RDT on the largest collection of multi-robot datasets to date and scaled it up to 1.2B parameters, which is the largest diffusion-based foundation model for robotic manipulation. We finally fine-tuned RDT on a self-created multi-task bimanual dataset with over 6K+ episodes to refine its manipulation capabilities. Experiments on real robots demonstrate that RDT significantly outperforms existing methods. It exhibits zero-shot generalization to unseen objects and scenes, understands and follows language instructions, learns new skills with just 1~5 demonstrations, and effectively handles complex, dexterous tasks. We refer to https://rdt-robotics.github.io/rdt-robotics/ for the code and videos.
absZh: 双臂操作在机器人领域至关重要，但由于协调两个机械臂的固有复杂性（导致多模态动作分布）以及训练数据的稀缺，开发基础模型极具挑战性。本文提出了机器人扩散变换器（RDT），这是一种开创性的双臂操作扩散基础模型。RDT基于扩散模型有效表示多模态性，通过可扩展变换器的创新设计处理多模态输入的异质性，并捕捉机器人数据的非线性和高频特性。为解决数据稀缺问题，我们进一步引入了物理可解释的统一动作空间，该空间能够统一各种机器人的动作表示，同时保留原始动作的物理意义，促进可迁移物理知识的学习。凭借这些设计，我们成功在迄今为止最大的多机器人数据集上预训练了RDT，并将其扩展至12亿参数，这是目前最大的基于扩散的机器人操作基础模型。最后，我们在自创的包含6000多个片段的多任务双臂数据集上对RDT进行微调，以完善其操作能力。真实机器人实验表明，RDT显著优于现有方法。它能够零样本泛化到未见过的物体和场景，理解并遵循语言指令，仅需1~5次演示即可学习新技能，并有效处理复杂灵巧的任务。代码和视频请参见https://rdt-robotics.github.io/rdt-robotics/。

contrib.en: Proposes Robotics Diffusion Transformer (RDT), a diffusion foundation model for bimanual manipulation with scalable Transformer architecture.
contrib.zh: 提出机器人扩散Transformer（RDT），一种用于双臂操作的扩散基础模型，具有可扩展的Transformer架构。

contrib.en: Introduces Physically Interpretable Unified Action Space to unify action representations across diverse robots for multi-robot pre-training.
contrib.zh: 引入物理可解释统一动作空间，统一不同机器人的动作表示，实现多机器人预训练。

contrib.en: Achieves state-of-the-art performance on bimanual tasks with 56% improvement in success rates over baselines.
contrib.zh: 在双臂任务上实现最先进性能，成功率比基线提高56%。

contrib.en: Demonstrates zero-shot generalization to unseen objects, scenes, and language instructions.
contrib.zh: 展示了对未见物体、场景和语言指令的零样本泛化能力。

contrib.en: Enables few-shot learning of new skills with only 1-5 demonstrations.
contrib.zh: 仅需1-5次演示即可实现新技能的少样本学习。

contrib.en: Scales model to 1.2B parameters, the largest diffusion-based foundation model for robotic manipulation.
contrib.zh: 将模型扩展到12亿参数，是最大的基于扩散的机器人操作基础模型。

limits.en: Model is only evaluated on ALOHA dual-arm robot; generalization to other dual-arm robots is not tested.
limits.zh: 模型仅在ALOHA双臂机器人上评估，未测试对其他双臂机器人的泛化性。

limits.en: Fine-tuning dataset is self-collected and limited to 6K+ trajectories, which may not cover all real-world scenarios.
limits.zh: 微调数据集为自收集，仅6000多条轨迹，可能无法覆盖所有真实场景。

limits.en: Pre-training relies on publicly available multi-robot datasets, which may contain biases or noise.
limits.zh: 预训练依赖公开的多机器人数据集，可能包含偏差或噪声。

limits.en: Diffusion model inference requires multiple denoising steps, leading to higher latency compared to deterministic methods.
limits.zh: 扩散模型推理需要多个去噪步骤，导致延迟高于确定性方法。

limits.en: The unified action space is designed for gripper arms only; robots with other end-effectors are not supported.
limits.zh: 统一动作空间仅针对夹爪臂设计，不支持其他末端执行器的机器人。

items.en: Bimanual manipulation is essential in robotics, yet developing foundation models is extremely challenging due to the inherent complexity of coordinating two robot arms (leading to multi-modal action distributions) and the scarcity of training data. In this paper, we present the Robotics Diffusion Transformer (RDT), a pioneering diffusion foundation model for bimanual manipulation. RDT builds on diffusion models to effectively represent multi-modality, with innovative designs of a scalable Transformer to deal with the heterogeneity of multi-modal inputs and to capture the nonlinearity and high frequency of robotic data. To address data scarcity, we further introduce a Physically Interpretable Unified Action Space, which can unify the action representations of various robots while preserving the physical meanings of original actions, facilitating learning transferrable physical knowledge. With these designs, we managed to pre-train RDT on the largest collection of multi-robot datasets to date and scaled it up to 1.21.21.2B parameters, which is the largest diffusion-based foundation model for robotic manipulation. We finally fine-tuned RDT on a self-created multi-task bimanual dataset with over 666K+ episodes to refine its manipulation capabilities. Experiments on real robots demonstrate that RDT significantly outperforms existing methods. It exhibits zero-shot generalization to unseen objects and scenes, understands and follows language instructions, learns new skills with just 1∼similar-to\sim5 demonstrations, and effectively handles complex, dexterous tasks. We refer to the project page for the code and videos.
items.zh: 双手操作在机器人领域至关重要，但由于协调两个机械臂的固有复杂性（导致多模态动作分布）以及训练数据的稀缺性，开发基础模型极具挑战性。本文提出了机器人扩散Transformer（RDT），这是一种开创性的双手操作扩散基础模型。RDT基于扩散模型有效表示多模态性，并创新性地设计了可扩展的Transformer来处理多模态输入的异质性，并捕捉机器人数据的非线性和高频特性。为解决数据稀缺问题，我们进一步引入了物理可解释统一动作空间，该空间可以统一各种机器人的动作表示，同时保留原始动作的物理意义，促进可迁移物理知识的学习。通过这些设计，我们成功地在迄今为止最大的多机器人数据集集合上预训练了RDT，并将其扩展到1.2B参数，这是最大的基于扩散的机器人操作基础模型。最后，我们在自建的多任务双手数据集（超过666K+个片段）上微调RDT，以完善其操作能力。真实机器人实验表明，RDT显著优于现有方法。它展现出对未见物体和场景的零样本泛化能力，理解并遵循语言指令，仅需1~5次演示即可学习新技能，并能有效处理复杂、灵巧的任务。代码和视频请参见项目页面。

items.en: Bimanual manipulation is essential for robots to accomplish real-world tasks (Edsinger & Kemp, 2007). For practical applications, a useful manipulation policy should be able to generalize to unseen scenarios, such as unseen objects and scenes. However, current approaches either depend on task-specific primitives (Mirrazavi Salehian et al., 2017; Rakita et al., 2019; Grannen et al., 2023a) or are limited to small-scale model, data and simple tasks (Krebs et al., 2021; Franzese et al., 2023; Grannen et al., 2023b; Zhao et al., 2023; Grotz et al., 2024; Liu et al., 2024), thereby exhibiting only narrow generalization and failing in complex tasks. Following the success in natural language processing (Achiam et al., 2023; Touvron et al., 2023) and computer vision (Radford et al., 2021; Kirillov et al., 2023), one promising direction to enable generalizable behaviors is to develop a foundation model through imitation learning on large-scale datasets.
items.zh: 双手操作对于机器人完成现实世界任务至关重要（Edsinger & Kemp, 2007）。在实际应用中，有用的操作策略应能泛化到未见场景，例如未见物体和场景。然而，当前方法要么依赖于任务特定的基元（Mirrazavi Salehian et al., 2017; Rakita et al., 2019; Grannen et al., 2023a），要么局限于小规模模型、数据和简单任务（Krebs et al., 2021; Franzese et al., 2023; Grannen et al., 2023b; Zhao et al., 2023; Grotz et al., 2024; Liu et al., 2024），因此仅表现出狭窄的泛化能力，并在复杂任务中失败。继自然语言处理（Achiam et al., 2023; Touvron et al., 2023）和计算机视觉（Radford et al., 2021; Kirillov et al., 2023）的成功之后，实现可泛化行为的一个有前景的方向是通过在大规模数据集上进行模仿学习来开发基础模型。

items.en: However, it is highly non-trivial to develop a bimanual manipulation foundation model. One main reason is that the accessible data for a specific dual-arm robot is significantly scarce (Sharma et al., 2018; Collaboration et al., 2023) due to high hardware costs, undermining the data-intensive requirements of training foundational models. Inspired by recent attempts in unimanual manipulation (Brohan et al., 2023; Kim et al., 2024), we seek to first pre-train on extensive multi-robot datasets and then fine-tune on the small dataset collected on the target dual-arm robot. This can help us to scale the data size up to three orders of magnitude, having the potential to learn transferrable physics knowledge from datasets of other robots. Nevertheless, there are two key technical challenges. First, a generalizable foundation model requires a highly capable architecture in terms of both expressiveness and scalabilty. The dimension of the action space in bimanual manipulation is twice that in unimanual manipulation, bringing a higher degree of multi-modality in the distribution of feasible actions (Li, 2006; Jia et al., 2024), as illustrated in Fig. 2(b). Accordingly, the model must be expressive enough to capture the multi-modality in action distributions. Previous methods (Zhao et al., 2023; Brohan et al., 2023; Kim et al., 2024) typically fail to meet this standard, leading to unsatisfactory performance. Besides, the architecture needs to effectively process inputs from different modalities, including text, images, and actions. It must be scalable to stably train on large-scale robotic data. Second, date heterogeneity, which is caused by variations in the physical structure and the action space definition across different robots, can lead to negative transfer and impeding policy generalization during training on multi-robot data (Pan & Yang, 2009). Existing approaches either discard robots with differing action spaces or retain only the parts of the data whose structure is constant across the robot, at the cost of losing valuable data (Brohan et al., 2023; Ghosh et al., 2023; Shah et al., 2023a).
items.zh: 然而，开发双手操作基础模型非常困难。一个主要原因是，由于硬件成本高昂，特定双臂机器人的可用数据非常稀缺（Sharma et al., 2018; Collaboration et al., 2023），这削弱了训练基础模型所需的数据密集型要求。受近期单臂操作尝试的启发（Brohan et al., 2023; Kim et al., 2024），我们寻求首先在广泛的多机器人数据集上进行预训练，然后在目标双臂机器人上收集的小数据集上进行微调。这有助于我们将数据规模扩大三个数量级，并有可能从其他机器人的数据集中学习可迁移的物理知识。然而，存在两个关键的技术挑战。首先，可泛化的基础模型需要在表达能力和可扩展性方面具有高度强大的架构。双手操作中动作空间的维度是单臂操作的两倍，导致可行动作分布中更高程度的多模态性（Li, 2006; Jia et al., 2024），如图2(b)所示。因此，模型必须具有足够的表达能力来捕捉动作分布中的多模态性。先前的方法（Zhao et al., 2023; Brohan et al., 2023; Kim et al., 2024）通常无法达到这一标准，导致性能不佳。此外，架构需要有效处理来自不同模态的输入，包括文本、图像和动作。它必须可扩展，以便在大型机器人数据上稳定训练。其次，数据异质性——由不同机器人的物理结构和动作空间定义差异引起——可能导致负迁移，并在多机器人数据训练期间阻碍策略泛化（Pan & Yang, 2009）。现有方法要么丢弃具有不同动作空间的机器人，要么仅保留数据结构在机器人间恒定的部分，代价是丢失有价值的数据（Brohan et al., 2023; Ghosh et al., 2023; Shah et al., 2023a）。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Overview of Robotics Diffusion Transformer with 1B-Parameters (RDT-1B), a language-conditioned visuomotor policy for bimanual manipulation,with state-of-the-art generalizability to unseen scenarios (See App. H for metric calculation details).
items.capZh: 图1：具有1B参数的机器人扩散Transformer（RDT-1B）概览，这是一种用于双手操作的语言条件视觉运动策略，具有对未见场景的最先进泛化能力（度量计算细节见附录H）。

items.en: In this paper, we introduce the Robotics Diffusion Transformer (RDT), the largest bimanual manipulation foundation model with strong generalizability. RDT employs Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) as its scalable backbone network (Xie et al., 2020), with special designs for language-conditioned bimanual manipulation with vision. For expressiveness, RDT excels in capturing the full modalities of bimanual actions from massive data by leveraging diffusion models’ capacity for modeling complex distributions (Sohn et al., 2015; Ho et al., 2020). For scalability, we harness the Transformer backbone and carefully design the multi-modal encoding to eliminate the heterogeneity of various modalities. To characterize the nonlinear dynamics (de Wit et al., 2012), high-frequency changes (Ghosh et al., 2023), and unstable numerical range inherent in robotic data, significantly differing from images and videos with temporal and spatial continuity (Chen et al., 2019; Liang et al., 2022), we make important modifications to the original DiT structure, including MLP decoding, improved normalization, and alternating condition injecting (See Fig. 4 for their importance). To further enable training RDT on heterogeneous data, we propose the Physically Interpretable Unified Action Space, a unified action format for various robots with gripper arms. This innovative format mitigates potential conflicts between different robots while retaining the physical meanings of the original actions, which can promote the model to learn generalizable physical knowledge across diverse robotic datasets.
items.zh: 本文介绍了机器人扩散Transformer（RDT），这是最大的具有强泛化能力的双手操作基础模型。RDT采用扩散Transformer（DiTs）作为其可扩展的骨干网络（Xie et al., 2020），并针对语言条件的视觉双手操作进行了特殊设计。在表达能力方面，RDT通过利用扩散模型建模复杂分布的能力（Sohn et al., 2015; Ho et al., 2020），擅长从海量数据中捕捉双手动作的全部模态。在可扩展性方面，我们利用Transformer骨干网络并精心设计多模态编码，以消除各种模态的异质性。为了刻画机器人数据中固有的非线性动力学（de Wit et al., 2012）、高频变化（Ghosh et al., 2023）和不稳定的数值范围——这与具有时间和空间连续性的图像和视频显著不同（Chen et al., 2019; Liang et al., 2022）——我们对原始DiT结构进行了重要修改，包括MLP解码、改进的归一化和交替条件注入（其重要性见图4）。为了进一步支持在异构数据上训练RDT，我们提出了物理可解释统一动作空间，这是一种适用于各种带夹爪机械臂机器人的统一动作格式。这种创新格式减轻了不同机器人之间的潜在冲突，同时保留了原始动作的物理意义，这有助于促进模型跨不同机器人数据集学习可泛化的物理知识。

items.en: With the above designs, we managed to pre-train the RDT model on the largest collection of multi-robot datasets to date (Collaboration et al., 2023; Walke et al., 2023; Fang et al., 2023; Kumar et al., 2024) and scale it up to 1.21.21.2B parameters, which is the largest diffusion-based pre-trained model for robotic manipulation. To further enhance its bimanual manipulation capabilities, we fine-tuned the RDT on a self-collected multi-task bimanual dataset comprising over 666K+ trajectories, which is one of the most extensive bimanual datasets. In our experiments, we have comprehensively evaluated RDT against strong baselines in both bimanual manipulation and robotic foundation models. Results show that RDT achieves state-of-the-art performance, outperforming baselines by achieving an improvement of 56%percent5656\% in success rates across a wide spectrum of challenging tasks. In particular, RDT has exceptional zero-shot and few-shot (1∼5similar-to151\sim 5 shots) generalizability to unseen objects, scenes, instructions, and even skills. RDT is also capable of accomplishing tasks requiring fine-grained operations, such as controlling a robot dog with a joystick. Finally, ablation studies show that diffusion modeling, large model size, and large data size all contribute to superior performance.
items.zh: 通过上述设计，我们成功地在迄今为止最大的多机器人数据集集合（Collaboration et al., 2023; Walke et al., 2023; Fang et al., 2023; Kumar et al., 2024）上预训练了RDT模型，并将其扩展到1.2B参数，这是最大的基于扩散的机器人操作预训练模型。为了进一步增强其双手操作能力，我们在自建的多任务双手数据集（包含超过666K+条轨迹）上微调了RDT，这是最广泛的双手数据集之一。在我们的实验中，我们全面评估了RDT与强基线在双手操作和机器人基础模型方面的性能。结果表明，RDT实现了最先进的性能，在广泛具有挑战性的任务中，成功率提高了56%。特别是，RDT对未见物体、场景、指令甚至技能具有卓越的零样本和少样本（1~5次）泛化能力。RDT还能够完成需要精细操作的任务，例如用操纵杆控制机器狗。最后，消融研究表明，扩散建模、大模型规模和大数据规模都有助于实现卓越性能。

items.en: Learning-based Bimanual Manipulation. One substantial challenge in learning a bimanual manipulation policy is the high dimensionality of the action space, which exacerbates the data scarsity (Zollner et al., 2004; Smith et al., 2012; Lioutikov et al., 2016; Stepputtis et al., 2022) and the multi-modal behavior (Colomé & Torras, 2018; 2020; Figueroa & Billard, 2017; Sharma et al., 2018; Xie et al., 2020; Franzese et al., 2023). Some works have developed more cost-effective interfaces for data collection (Zhao et al., 2023; Aldaco et al., 2024), but they are limited to specific hardware configurations and still insufficient to bridge the data gap for a generalizable policy. Others attempt to reduce data requirements by introducing inductive biases, such as distinguishing two arms for stabilization and functionality (Grannen et al., 2023b), parameterizing movement primitives (Batinica et al., 2017; Amadio et al., 2019; Chitnis et al., 2020; Franzese et al., 2023), or using voxel representations (Grotz et al., 2024; Liu et al., 2024). These methods use strong priors or simplified modeling, which successfully reduce the action space, but at the cost of a reduced scope of application and failing to express the multi-modality of bimanual behaviors (Pearce et al., 2023).
items.zh: 基于学习的双手操作。学习双手操作策略的一个重大挑战是动作空间的高维性，这加剧了数据稀缺性（Zollner et al., 2004; Smith et al., 2012; Lioutikov et al., 2016; Stepputtis et al., 2022）和多模态行为（Colomé & Torras, 2018; 2020; Figueroa & Billard, 2017; Sharma et al., 2018; Xie et al., 2020; Franzese et al., 2023）。一些工作开发了更具成本效益的数据收集接口（Zhao et al., 2023; Aldaco et al., 2024），但它们局限于特定的硬件配置，仍然不足以弥合可泛化策略的数据差距。其他工作尝试通过引入归纳偏置来减少数据需求，例如区分两个臂用于稳定和功能（Grannen et al., 2023b）、参数化运动基元（Batinica et al., 2017; Amadio et al., 2019; Chitnis et al., 2020; Franzese et al., 2023）或使用体素表示（Grotz et al., 2024; Liu et al., 2024）。这些方法使用强先验或简化建模，成功减少了动作空间，但代价是应用范围缩小，并且无法表达双手行为的多模态性（Pearce et al., 2023）。

items.en: Foundation Models for Robotics. Foundation models have shown immense promise in enabling generalizable behaviors by training multi-task “generalist” models (Brohan et al., 2022; 2023; Ghosh et al., 2023; Kim et al., 2024) on large multi-task robot datasets (Collaboration et al., 2023; Brohan et al., 2022; Fang et al., 2023). Most studies adapt large vision-language models to directly predict action (Brohan et al., 2022; Driess et al., 2023; Brohan et al., 2023; Collaboration et al., 2023; Kim et al., 2024). While demonstrating generalization to new objects and tasks, they face issues with quantization errors and uncoordinated behaviors (Pearce et al., 2023) when applied to bimanual manipulation, largely due to their discretization of action spaces. To enhance precision, diffusion models have been used for continuous control (Ho et al., 2020; Chi et al., 2023; Pearce et al., 2023; Ghosh et al., 2023). Ghosh et al. (2023) pre-train a Transformer-based diffusion policy on a subset of Open X-Embodiment (Collaboration et al., 2023) dataset (252525 datasets), with up to 939393M parameters.
items.zh: 机器人基础模型。基础模型通过在大型多任务机器人数据集（Collaboration et al., 2023; Brohan et al., 2022; Fang et al., 2023）上训练多任务“通才”模型（Brohan et al., 2022; 2023; Ghosh et al., 2023; Kim et al., 2024），在实现可泛化行为方面显示出巨大潜力。大多数研究将大型视觉语言模型调整为直接预测动作（Brohan et al., 2022; Driess et al., 2023; Brohan et al., 2023; Collaboration et al., 2023; Kim et al., 2024）。虽然它们展示了对新物体和任务的泛化能力，但在应用于双手操作时，由于动作空间的离散化，面临量化误差和不协调行为的问题（Pearce et al., 2023）。为了提高精度，扩散模型已被用于连续控制（Ho et al., 2020; Chi et al., 2023; Pearce et al., 2023; Ghosh et al., 2023）。Ghosh et al.（2023）在Open X-Embodiment（Collaboration et al., 2023）数据集的子集（25个数据集）上预训练了一个基于Transformer的扩散策略，参数高达93M。

items.en: We start by formulating the task and elaborating on the challenges. To evaluate the model on the hardware, we choose the ALOHA dual-arm robot as our target robot since it is one of the most representative dual-arm robots and is suitable for collecting human demonstration data via teleoperation (Zhao et al., 2023; Fu et al., 2024; Aldaco et al., 2024). Fig. 2(a) shows a schematic diagram of the target robot, which consists of two arms with grippers and three cameras. Note that our setting and foundation model are generic to any dual-arm gripper robot.
items.zh: 我们首先形式化任务并详细阐述挑战。为了在硬件上评估模型，我们选择ALOHA双臂机器人作为目标机器人，因为它是最具代表性的双臂机器人之一，并且适合通过遥操作收集人类演示数据（Zhao et al., 2023; Fu et al., 2024; Aldaco et al., 2024）。图2(a)显示了目标机器人的示意图，它由两个带夹爪的臂和三个摄像头组成。注意，我们的设置和基础模型适用于任何双臂夹爪机器人。

items.en: We consider the concrete task of language-conditioned bimanual manipulation with vision, which is fundamental in robotics and has great value in real-world scenarios such as household (Stepputtis et al., 2020; Brohan et al., 2022; Zhao et al., 2023). Formally, given a language instruction ℓℓ\ell, the policy is presented with an observation 𝒐tsubscript𝒐𝑡{\bm{o}}_{t} at time t∈ℕ+𝑡superscriptℕt\in\mathbb{N}^{+}; and then it produces an action 𝒂tsubscript𝒂𝑡{\bm{a}}_{t} to control the two robot arms to achieve the goal specified by ℓℓ\ell. The observation is represented as a triple 𝒐t:=(𝑿t−Timg+1:t+1,𝒛t,c)assignsubscript𝒐𝑡subscript𝑿:𝑡subscript𝑇img1𝑡1subscript𝒛𝑡𝑐{\bm{o}}_{t}:=({\bm{X}}_{t-T_{\text{img}}+1:t+1},{\bm{z}}_{t},c), where 𝑿t−Timg+1:t+1:=(𝑿t−Timg+1,…,𝑿t)assignsubscript𝑿:𝑡subscript𝑇img1𝑡1subscript𝑿𝑡subscript𝑇img1…subscript𝑿𝑡{\bm{X}}_{t-T_{\text{img}}+1:t+1}:=({\bm{X}}_{t-T_{\text{img}}+1},\dots,{\bm{X}}_{t}) is the RGB observation history of size Timgsubscript𝑇imgT_{\text{img}}, 𝒛tsubscript𝒛𝑡{\bm{z}}_{t} is the low-dimensional proprioception of the robot, and c𝑐c is the control frequency. The action 𝒂tsubscript𝒂𝑡{\bm{a}}_{t} is usually a subset of the desired proprioception 𝒛t+1subscript𝒛𝑡1{\bm{z}}_{t+1}111E.g., 𝒛tsubscript𝒛𝑡{\bm{z}}_{t} may include the gripper position at time t𝑡t, and 𝒂tsubscript𝒂𝑡{\bm{a}}_{t} can be the target gripper position at step t+1𝑡1t+1..
items.zh: 我们考虑具体的语言条件视觉双手操作任务，这在机器人领域是基础性的，并且在家庭等现实场景中具有重要价值（Stepputtis et al., 2020; Brohan et al., 2022; Zhao et al., 2023）。形式上，给定语言指令ℓ，策略在时间t∈ℕ+接收到观测𝒐_t；然后产生动作𝒂_t以控制两个机械臂实现ℓ指定的目标。观测表示为三元组𝒐_t := (𝑿_{t-T_img+1:t+1}, 𝒛_t, c)，其中𝑿_{t-T_img+1:t+1} := (𝑿_{t-T_img+1}, …, 𝑿_t)是大小为T_img的RGB观测历史，𝒛_t是机器人的低维本体感知，c是控制频率。动作𝒂_t通常是期望本体感知𝒛_{t+1}的子集¹。

items.en: A specific task in bimanual manipulation typically consists of multiple elements: a skill (e.g., verbs like “pick” or “wipe”), an object (e.g., nouns like “bottle” or “table”), a scene (i.e. the environment in which the task takes place), and a modality describing how the skill is performed (e.g., adverbials like “pick the bottle with the left hand”). Given a new task, a practical policy is required to generalize to unseen elements that have not appeared in training data. This is challenging for previous rule-based methods as well as learning-based methods with small models/data, as discussed in Section 2.
items.zh: 双手操作中的特定任务通常包含多个元素：技能（例如动词“拾取”或“擦拭”）、物体（例如名词“瓶子”或“桌子”）、场景（即任务发生的环境）以及描述技能执行方式的模态（例如状语“用左手拾取瓶子”）。给定一个新任务，实用的策略需要泛化到训练数据中未出现的未见元素。正如第2节所讨论的，这对于先前的基于规则的方法以及使用小模型/数据的学习方法来说具有挑战性。

items.en: We aim to train a foundation model policy via imitation learning to achieve generalizability. However, the available data for a specific dual-arm robot is particularly scarce (<10absent10<10K trajectories) due to high hardware costs, far from the common requirement to train a foundation model. To address this, we propose to employ a pre-training and fine-tuning pipeline (Radford et al., 2018) to take advantage of data from multiple robots by drawing inspiration from recent advances in unimanual manipulation (Ghosh et al., 2023; Collaboration et al., 2023; Kim et al., 2024). In this manner, we would expand the data size by three orders of magnitude. Specifically, we first pre-train the model on a large-scale multi-robot dataset 𝒟presubscript𝒟pre\mathcal{D}_{\text{pre}} (mostly single-arm) and then fine-tune on a dataset of the target robot 𝒟ftsubscript𝒟ft\mathcal{D}_{\text{ft}}. We denote the dataset by 𝒟⋅={(ℓ(i),𝒐t(i),𝒂t(i))∣0≤t<T(i),1≤i≤N}subscript𝒟⋅conditional-setsuperscriptℓ𝑖subscriptsuperscript𝒐𝑖𝑡subscriptsuperscript𝒂𝑖𝑡formulae-sequence0𝑡superscript𝑇𝑖1𝑖𝑁\mathcal{D}_{\cdot}=\{(\ell^{(i)},{\bm{o}}^{(i)}_{t},{\bm{a}}^{(i)}_{t})\mid 0\leq t<T^{(i)},1\leq i\leq N\}, where T(i)superscript𝑇𝑖T^{(i)} is the length of the i𝑖i-th trajectory and N𝑁N is the number of trajectories. Moreover, it is worth emphasizing that our goal is to use multi-robot data to enhance the model’s generalizability in bimanual manipulation rather than developing a cross-embodiment model for various robots. There are two main challenges to developing such a foundation model with multi-robot data:
items.zh: 我们的目标是通过模仿学习训练一个基础模型策略以实现泛化能力。然而，由于硬件成本高昂，特定双臂机器人的可用数据特别稀缺（<10K条轨迹），远未达到训练基础模型的常见要求。为了解决这个问题，我们提出采用预训练和微调流程（Radford et al., 2018），借鉴近期单臂操作进展（Ghosh et al., 2023; Collaboration et al., 2023; Kim et al., 2024），利用来自多个机器人的数据。通过这种方式，我们将数据规模扩大三个数量级。具体来说，我们首先在大规模多机器人数据集𝒟_pre（主要是单臂）上预训练模型，然后在目标机器人数据集𝒟_ft上进行微调。我们将数据集表示为𝒟_· = {(ℓ^{(i)}, 𝒐_t^{(i)}, 𝒂_t^{(i)}) | 0 ≤ t < T^{(i)}, 1 ≤ i ≤ N}，其中T^{(i)}是第i条轨迹的长度，N是轨迹数量。此外，值得强调的是，我们的目标是使用多机器人数据来增强模型在双手操作中的泛化能力，而不是为各种机器人开发跨本体模型。使用多机器人数据开发这样的基础模型存在两个主要挑战：

items.capEn: Figure 3: RDT framework. Heterogeneous action spaces of various robots are embedded into a unified action space for multi-robot training. Inputs: proprioception 𝒛tsubscript𝒛𝑡{\bm{z}}_{t}, noisy action chunk 𝒂~t:t+Tasubscript~𝒂:𝑡𝑡subscript𝑇𝑎\tilde{{\bm{a}}}_{t:t+T_{a}}, control frequency c𝑐c, and diffusion time step k𝑘k, acting as denoising inputs; image inputs (Timg=2subscript𝑇img2T_{\text{img}}=2 and 𝑿⋅={𝑿⋅1,𝑿⋅2,𝑿⋅3}subscript𝑿⋅superscriptsubscript𝑿⋅1superscriptsubscript𝑿⋅2superscriptsubscript𝑿⋅3{\bm{X}}_{\cdot}=\{{\bm{X}}_{\cdot}^{1},{\bm{X}}_{\cdot}^{2},{\bm{X}}_{\cdot}^{3}\} denotes a set of images from exterior, right-wrist, and left wrist cameras) and language inputs, acting as conditions. Outputs: denoised action chunk 𝒂t:t+Tasubscript𝒂:𝑡𝑡subscript𝑇𝑎{\bm{a}}_{t:t+T_{a}}.
items.capZh: 图3：RDT框架。各种机器人的异构动作空间被嵌入到统一动作空间中进行多机器人训练。输入：本体感知𝒛_t、噪声动作块𝒂̃_{t:t+T_a}、控制频率c和扩散时间步k，作为去噪输入；图像输入（T_img=2，𝑿_· = {𝑿_·^1, 𝑿_·^2, 𝑿_·^3}表示来自外部、右腕和左腕摄像头的图像集）和语言输入，作为条件。输出：去噪后的动作块𝒂_{t:t+T_a}。

items.en: Challenge 1: How to design a powerful architecture? A generalizable foundation model necessitates a powerful architecture. This requirement encompasses two primary aspects. Firstly, the architecture must possess sufficient expressiveness to capture the multi-modality in the action distribution. Fig. 2(b) illustrates a toy example where the robot attempts to grasp a cube. We can see that there are many modes to finish this task, in contrast to unimanual manipulation, where only one robot arm is controlled. When collecting demonstrations, the human operator may randomly pick one of them, leading to multi-modality in the collected action data. Secondly, scalability is necessary for such an architecture. As a foundation model, it should effectively process heterogeneous inputs from various modalities (text, images, actions, etc.) while being scalable to train stably on large datasets.
items.zh: 挑战1：如何设计强大的架构？可泛化的基础模型需要强大的架构。这一要求包含两个主要方面。首先，架构必须具有足够的表达能力来捕捉动作分布中的多模态性。图2(b)展示了一个玩具示例，其中机器人试图抓取一个立方体。我们可以看到，完成这个任务有许多模式，这与仅控制一个机械臂的单臂操作形成对比。在收集演示时，人类操作员可能随机选择其中一种模式，导致收集的动作数据中出现多模态性。其次，这样的架构需要可扩展性。作为基础模型，它应该有效处理来自各种模态（文本、图像、动作等）的异构输入，同时可扩展以在大型数据集上稳定训练。

items.en: Challenge 2: How to train on heterogeneous data? Training on multi-robot data presents a unique challenge of data heterogeneity. The physical structure and the action space can vary greatly across different robots. Previous attempts either restrict themselves to a subset of robots with similar action spaces (Yang et al., 2023; Ghosh et al., 2023; Kim et al., 2024) or only retain a subset of inputs sharing the same structure (Collaboration et al., 2023; Yang et al., 2024), at the cost of losing a lot of information. It remains largely under-addressed on how to train models on such heterogeneous data.
items.zh: 挑战2：如何在异构数据上训练？在多机器人数据上训练带来了数据异质性的独特挑战。不同机器人的物理结构和动作空间可能差异很大。先前的尝试要么将自己限制在具有相似动作空间的机器人子集上（Yang et al., 2023; Ghosh et al., 2023; Kim et al., 2024），要么仅保留共享相同结构的输入子集（Collaboration et al., 2023; Yang et al., 2024），代价是丢失大量信息。如何在这种异构数据上训练模型仍然在很大程度上未得到充分解决。

items.en: We now present Robotics Diffusion Transformer (RDT), as illustrated in Fig. 3. In Sec. 4.1, we present the diffusion model and the corresponding architecture to address Challenge 1. In Sec. 4.2, we resolve Challenge 2 by proposing a physically interpretable unified action space to unify various robot action spaces and enable multi-robot pre-training. We also collect a comprehensive multi-task bimanual dataset for fine-tuning to improve the bimanual manipulation capabilities of RDT.
items.zh: 我们现在介绍机器人扩散Transformer（RDT），如图3所示。在第4.1节中，我们介绍了扩散模型和相应的架构以解决挑战1。在第4.2节中，我们通过提出物理可解释统一动作空间来解决挑战2，该空间统一了各种机器人的动作空间并实现了多机器人预训练。我们还收集了一个全面的多任务双手数据集用于微调，以提高RDT的双手操作能力。

items.en: Due to multi-modality, given the language instruction ℓℓ\ell and observation 𝒐tsubscript𝒐𝑡{\bm{o}}_{t}, there may be many possible actions 𝒂tsubscript𝒂𝑡{\bm{a}}_{t} to proceed with the task. The policy will learn the “average” of action modes if we model it as a deterministic mapping (ℓ,𝒐t)↦𝒂tmaps-toℓsubscript𝒐𝑡subscript𝒂𝑡(\ell,{\bm{o}}_{t})\mapsto{\bm{a}}_{t} and regress the tuples of (ℓ,𝒐t,𝒂t)ℓsubscript𝒐𝑡subscript𝒂𝑡(\ell,{\bm{o}}_{t},{\bm{a}}_{t}) in the training data. This may result in out-of-distribution actions, such as the arithmetic mean of multiple modes, which can be completely infeasible (Pearce et al., 2023). Instead, we choose to model the continuous conditional distribution p​(𝒂t|ℓ,𝒐t)𝑝conditionalsubscript𝒂𝑡ℓsubscript𝒐𝑡p({\bm{a}}_{t}|\ell,{\bm{o}}_{t}). As discussed in Section 2, among various approaches, diffusion models excel in both expressiveness and sampling quality, but can be slow to sample a high-dimensional data (e.g., images). Luckily, for our settings, the drawback is minor since that 𝒂tsubscript𝒂𝑡{\bm{a}}_{t} has a much lower dimension than images, which requires only minimal sampling overhead. This has made diffusion models an ideal choice for policy as in Chi et al. (2023).
items.zh: 由于多模态性，给定语言指令ℓ和观测𝒐_t，可能存在许多可能的动作𝒐_t来继续任务。如果我们将策略建模为确定性映射(ℓ, 𝒐_t) ↦ 𝒂_t并对训练数据中的(ℓ, 𝒐_t, 𝒂_t)元组进行回归，策略将学习动作模式的“平均值”。这可能导致分布外动作，例如多个模式的算术平均值，这可能是完全不可行的（Pearce et al., 2023）。相反，我们选择建模连续条件分布p(𝒂_t | ℓ, 𝒐_t)。如第2节所述，在各种方法中，扩散模型在表达能力和采样质量方面表现出色，但采样高维数据（例如图像）可能较慢。幸运的是，对于我们的设置，这个缺点很小，因为𝒂_t的维度远低于图像，只需要最小的采样开销。这使得扩散模型成为策略的理想选择，如Chi et al.（2023）所述。

items.en: Nevertheless, employing diffusion models for robotic tasks faces unique challenges since the inherent properties of robotic physics quantities (i.e., the action and proprioception) are different from image/video data. Image and video data, while high-dimensional, often exhibit a degree of temporal and spatial continuity (Chen et al., 2019; Liang et al., 2022), with changes between frames typically being incremental. In contrast, robotic physics quantities are characterized by its nonlinear dynamics (de Wit et al., 2012) and the potential for high-frequency changes stemming from the physical interactions, such as collision, constraints, and material properties like damping. Moreover, the quantities also feature an unstable numerical range, probably due to extreme values caused by unreliable sensors. This underscores the necessity of adapting current diffusion models to effectively capture the instability and nonlinearity of robot data. Next, we will first elaborate on diffusion formulation and then introduce our design of architecture to resolve these challenges.
items.zh: 然而，将扩散模型用于机器人任务面临独特的挑战，因为机器人物理量（即动作和本体感知）的固有属性与图像/视频数据不同。图像和视频数据虽然高维，但通常表现出一定程度的时间和空间连续性（Chen et al., 2019; Liang et al., 2022），帧之间的变化通常是渐进的。相比之下，机器人物理量的特点是其非线性动力学（de Wit et al., 2012）以及由物理交互（如碰撞、约束和阻尼等材料属性）引起的高频变化可能性。此外，这些量还具有不稳定的数值范围，可能是由于不可靠传感器导致的极端值。这强调了调整当前扩散模型以有效捕捉机器人数据的不稳定性和非线性的必要性。接下来，我们将首先阐述扩散公式，然后介绍我们的架构设计以解决这些挑战。

We provide a detailed discussion in App. A.
items.zh: 其中 k∼Uniform​({1,…,K})，ϵ∼𝒩​(𝟎,𝑰)，且 (ℓ,𝒐t,𝒂t) 从我们的训练数据集中采样。在本文后续部分，我们将噪声动作输入记为 𝒂~t:=α¯k​𝒂t+1−α¯k​ϵ，为简洁起见省略了上标 k。此外，在实践中，我们倾向于一次性预测一个动作序列，即动作块，以鼓励时间一致性（Chi et al., 2023）并通过减少任务中的决策次数来缓解随时间累积的误差（Zhao et al., 2023）。具体来说，我们对 p​(𝒂t:t+Ta|ℓ,𝒐t) 建模，其中 𝒂t:t+Ta:=(𝒂t,…,𝒂t+Ta−1) 是一个动作块，Ta 表示块大小（Zhao et al., 2023）。我们在附录 A 中提供了详细讨论。

items.en: We now present the design of the architecture, including the encoding of multi-modal inputs and the network structure of f𝜽subscript𝑓𝜽f_{\bm{\theta}}, while details are deferred to App. B.
items.zh: 我们现在介绍架构的设计，包括多模态输入的编码和 f𝜽 的网络结构，细节见附录 B。

items.en: The heterogeneity of multi-modal inputs is reflected in the structure; that is, the format and number of dimensions of each modality are significantly different. This has posed challenges for mult-modal training. To address this, we encode these diverse modalities into a unified latent space. Below are the encoding methods:
items.zh: 多模态输入的异质性体现在结构上；即每种模态的格式和维度数量显著不同。这给多模态训练带来了挑战。为了解决这个问题，我们将这些不同的模态编码到一个统一的潜在空间中。以下是编码方法：

items.en: Low-Dimensional Inputs are low-dimensional vectors that represent physical quantities of the robot, including the proprioception, the action chunk, and the control frequency. To encode them, we use MLPs (with Fourier features (Tancik et al., 2020)), which can effectively capture the high-frequency changes in low-dimensional spaces.
items.zh: 低维输入是表示机器人物理量的低维向量，包括本体感觉、动作块和控制频率。为了编码它们，我们使用 MLP（带有傅里叶特征（Tancik et al., 2020）），这可以有效捕捉低维空间中的高频变化。

items.en: Image Inputs are high-dimensional and contain rich spatial and semantic information. To extract compact representations, we use an image-text-aligned pre-trained vision encoder, SigLIP (Zhai et al., 2023). We fix its weights during training to save GPU memory.
items.zh: 图像输入是高维的，包含丰富的空间和语义信息。为了提取紧凑表示，我们使用一个图像-文本对齐的预训练视觉编码器 SigLIP（Zhai et al., 2023）。我们在训练期间固定其权重以节省 GPU 内存。

items.en: Language Inputs are of varying length and highly abstract, posing integration challenges due to their complexity and ambiguity. To encode them, we use a pre-trained Transformer-based language model, T5-XXL (Raffel et al., 2020). We also fix its weights during training to save GPU memory.
items.zh: 语言输入长度可变且高度抽象，由于其复杂性和模糊性，集成面临挑战。为了编码它们，我们使用一个预训练的基于 Transformer 的语言模型 T5-XXL（Raffel et al., 2020）。我们也在训练期间固定其权重以节省 GPU 内存。

items.en: In addition to structure, heterogeneity features the different amounts of information contained in different inputs. First, data in different modalities contain different amounts of information. For example, images usually contain more information than text, and after encoding, they produce more tokens. Second, different inputs of the same modality may hold very different amounts of information. For example, the exterior camera of a robot has a more global view and contains richer information than the wrist cameras, as shown in the upper right of Fig. 3. In this case, the model may learn a shortcut: only focusing on the exterior view and ignoring the wrist views, thereby losing the ability to perceive depth. To tackle this issue, we randomly and independently mask each multi-modal input with a certain probability during encoding to prevent the model from over-relying on a specific input.
items.zh: 除了结构之外，异质性还体现在不同输入包含的信息量不同。首先，不同模态的数据包含的信息量不同。例如，图像通常比文本包含更多信息，编码后产生更多 token。其次，同一模态的不同输入可能包含非常不同的信息量。例如，机器人的外部摄像头具有更全局的视野，比腕部摄像头包含更丰富的信息，如图 3 右上角所示。在这种情况下，模型可能学习到捷径：只关注外部视图而忽略腕部视图，从而失去感知深度的能力。为了解决这个问题，我们在编码期间以一定概率随机独立地掩码每个多模态输入，以防止模型过度依赖特定输入。

items.capZh: (a) 无 QKN 和 RMSN 的损失

items.en: We choose Transformer as the scalable backbone network (Bao et al., 2023; Peebles & Xie, 2023) and make the following three key modifications from Diffusion Transfomer (DiT) by considering the characteristics of our robotic problem:
items.zh: 我们选择 Transformer 作为可扩展的骨干网络（Bao et al., 2023; Peebles & Xie, 2023），并考虑我们机器人问题的特点，对 Diffusion Transformer（DiT）进行了以下三个关键修改：

items.en: QKNorm & RMSNorm. The unstable numerical range of the inputting robotic physical quantities can lead to problems such as gradient instability and numerical overflow, especially when training large foundation models. To solve this problem, we add QKNorm (Henry et al., 2020) to avoid numerical instability when calculating attention. Besides, we also note that our problem can be considered as a time series forecasting task, and the centering operation in the original DiTs’ LayerNorm could cause token shift and attention shift, thus destroying the symmetry of the time series (Huang et al., 2024). Therefore, we replace LayerNorm with RMSNorm (Zhang & Sennrich, 2019) without a centering operation. Fig. 4 shows that large-scale pre-training tends to be very unstable or even explode without this modification.
items.zh: QKNorm 和 RMSNorm。输入的机器人物理量的数值范围不稳定可能导致梯度不稳定和数值溢出等问题，尤其是在训练大型基础模型时。为了解决这个问题，我们添加 QKNorm（Henry et al., 2020）以避免计算注意力时的数值不稳定性。此外，我们还注意到我们的问题可以被视为时间序列预测任务，原始 DiT 的 LayerNorm 中的居中操作可能导致 token 偏移和注意力偏移，从而破坏时间序列的对称性（Huang et al., 2024）。因此，我们将 LayerNorm 替换为没有居中操作的 RMSNorm（Zhang & Sennrich, 2019）。图 4 显示，如果没有此修改，大规模预训练往往非常不稳定甚至发散。

items.en: MLP Decoder. To improve the approximation capability for nonlinear robot actions, we replace the final linear decoder with a nonlinear MLP decoder as a projection from the latent space back to the physical space. As empirically shown in Fig. 4, without this design, RDT cannot effectively capture nonlinear dynamics and thus loses the ability to accomplish dexterous tasks that require delicate operations.
items.zh: MLP 解码器。为了提高对非线性机器人动作的逼近能力，我们将最终的线性解码器替换为非线性 MLP 解码器，作为从潜在空间到物理空间的投影。如图 4 的实验所示，如果没有这种设计，RDT 无法有效捕捉非线性动力学，从而失去完成需要精细操作的灵巧任务的能力。

items.en: Alternating Condition Injection (ACI). In our model, image and language inputs serve as conditions, which are high-dimensional and variable in length, contrasting with the class label conditions in traditional DiTs (Xie et al., 2020). These informative conditions are challenging to compress into a single token, making the original adaptive layer norm approach unsuitable. Therefore, we employ cross-attention to accommodate conditions of varying lengths avoiding the information loss in further compression. Besides, we further analyze that, given that image tokens are usually much more than text tokens, simultaneous injection of both modalities tends to overshadow text-related information, thus impairing the capability of the instruction following (see Fig. 4 for quantitative results). To mitigate this issue, we strategically alternate between injecting image and text tokens in successive layers’ cross-attention rather than injecting both in every layer.
items.zh: 交替条件注入（ACI）。在我们的模型中，图像和语言输入作为条件，这些条件是高维且长度可变的，与传统 DiT 中的类标签条件形成对比（Xie et al., 2020）。这些信息丰富的条件难以压缩到单个 token 中，使得原始的自适应层归一化方法不适用。因此，我们采用交叉注意力来适应不同长度的条件，避免进一步压缩中的信息损失。此外，我们进一步分析，鉴于图像 token 通常远多于文本 token，同时注入两种模态往往会掩盖文本相关信息，从而损害指令跟随能力（参见图 4 的定量结果）。为了缓解这个问题，我们策略性地在连续层的交叉注意力中交替注入图像和文本 token，而不是在每一层都同时注入两者。

items.en: To enable training on heterogeneous multi-robot data, we need a unified action space shared among various robots, which can provide a unified format for multi-robot actions. The mapping from the original action space of a robot to the unified action space should be physically interpretable, each of whose dimensions should have a clear physical meaning. This can encourage the model to learn shared physical laws from different robot data, thereby improving the efficiency of learning from data of different robots (Shah et al., 2023a).
items.zh: 为了能够在异构多机器人数据上进行训练，我们需要一个在各种机器人之间共享的统一动作空间，这可以为多机器人动作提供统一格式。从机器人原始动作空间到统一动作空间的映射应该是物理可解释的，其每个维度都应具有明确的物理意义。这可以鼓励模型从不同机器人数据中学习共享的物理定律，从而提高从不同机器人数据中学习的效率（Shah et al., 2023a）。

items.en: The design of the space consists of two steps. Firstly, for each robot, we can use a single space to accommodate both its proprioception 𝒛tsubscript𝒛𝑡{\bm{z}}_{t} and action 𝒂tsubscript𝒂𝑡{\bm{a}}_{t}. This is because 𝒂tsubscript𝒂𝑡{\bm{a}}_{t} is usually a subset of the desired 𝒛t+1subscript𝒛𝑡1{\bm{z}}_{t+1} (de Wit et al., 2012; Kouvaritakis & Cannon, 2016), and thus the space of 𝒛tsubscript𝒛𝑡{\bm{z}}_{t} naturally contains the space of 𝒂tsubscript𝒂𝑡{\bm{a}}_{t}. Secondly, we design a unified space that encompasses all the main physical quantities of most robots with gripper arms. As illustrated in the left side of Fig. 3, we embed the action space of a robot into this unified space by filling each element of the original action vector into the corresponding position of the unified action space vector according to its physical meaning, with the remaining positions being padded. The specific definition of the space is given in App. C.
items.zh: 该空间的设计包括两个步骤。首先，对于每个机器人，我们可以使用一个单一空间来容纳其本体感觉 𝒛t 和动作 𝒂t。这是因为 𝒂t 通常是期望的 𝒛t+1 的子集（de Wit et al., 2012; Kouvaritakis & Cannon, 2016），因此 𝒛t 的空间自然包含 𝒂t 的空间。其次，我们设计了一个统一空间，涵盖了大多数带有夹爪臂的机器人的主要物理量。如图 3 左侧所示，我们通过将原始动作向量的每个元素根据其物理意义填充到统一动作空间向量的相应位置，其余位置进行填充，从而将机器人的动作空间嵌入到这个统一空间中。该空间的具体定义见附录 C。

items.en: Under this unified space, we are able to pre-train RDT on data from almost all modern robots with gripper arms and greatly expand the data scale toward the requirement for a foundation model. Specifically, our collection of pre-training datasets includes 464646 datasets of various robots, with a total size of 111M+ trajectories and 212121TB. More details and preprocessing are deferred to App. D.
items.zh: 在这个统一空间下，我们能够在几乎所有现代带有夹爪臂的机器人的数据上预训练 RDT，并大幅扩展数据规模以满足基础模型的需求。具体来说，我们收集的预训练数据集包括 46 个不同机器人的数据集，总规模超过 100 万条轨迹和 21 TB。更多细节和预处理见附录 D。

items.en: Though having been pre-trained on large-scale datasets, RDT could still need help to zero-shot generalize to the target dual-arm robot due to the embodiment gap. To bridge the gap, we need to collect a multi-task bimanual dataset on the target robot for fine-tuning. Recent advances in large language models (Ziegler et al., 2019; Brown et al., 2020; Touvron et al., 2023) have shown that high-quality fine-tuning datasets are crucial for model performance. We ensure the high quality of our dataset from three aspects: (1) Regarding quantity, we have collected 666K+ trajectories, making our dataset one of the largest bimanual datasets nowadays; (2) Regarding comprehensiveness, we consider 300300300+ challenging tasks, covering most manipulation task types, from pick-and-place to plugging cables, even including writing math equations; (3) Regarding diversity, we prepare 100100100+ objects with rigid and non-rigid bodies of various sizes and textures and 151515+ different rooms with different lighting conditions. Besides, we further utilize GPT-4-Turbo (Achiam et al., 2023) to rewrite human-annotated instructions to increase text diversity. For more information, we refer to Fig. 6 and App. E.
items.zh: 尽管在大规模数据集上进行了预训练，但由于具身差距，RDT 可能仍难以零样本泛化到目标双臂机器人。为了弥合这一差距，我们需要在目标机器人上收集多任务双臂数据集进行微调。大型语言模型的最新进展（Ziegler et al., 2019; Brown et al., 2020; Touvron et al., 2023）表明，高质量的微调数据集对模型性能至关重要。我们从三个方面确保数据集的高质量：（1）数量方面，我们收集了超过 60 万条轨迹，使我们的数据集成为目前最大的双臂数据集之一；（2）全面性方面，我们考虑了超过 300 个具有挑战性的任务，涵盖了从抓取放置到插拔电缆的大多数操作任务类型，甚至包括书写数学方程；（3）多样性方面，我们准备了超过 100 个具有不同尺寸和纹理的刚性和非刚性物体，以及超过 15 个具有不同光照条件的房间。此外，我们还利用 GPT-4-Turbo（Achiam et al., 2023）重写人工标注的指令以增加文本多样性。更多信息请参见图 6 和附录 E。

items.en: We aim to answer the following questions through real-robot experiments: 𝒬𝒬\mathcal{Q}1: Can RDT zero-shot generalize to unseen objects and scenes? 𝒬𝒬\mathcal{Q}2: How effective is RDT’s zero-shot instruction-following capability for unseen modalities? 𝒬𝒬\mathcal{Q}3: Can RDT facilitate few-shot learning for previously unseen skills? 𝒬𝒬\mathcal{Q}4: Is RDT capable of completing tasks that require delicate operations? and 𝒬𝒬\mathcal{Q}5: Are large model sizes, extensive data, and diffusion modeling helpful for RDT’s performance?
items.zh: 我们旨在通过真实机器人实验回答以下问题：𝒬1：RDT 能否零样本泛化到未见过的物体和场景？𝒬2：RDT 对未见模态的零样本指令跟随能力有多有效？𝒬3：RDT 能否促进对未见技能的少样本学习？𝒬4：RDT 能否完成需要精细操作的任务？以及 𝒬5：大模型规模、大量数据和扩散建模是否有助于 RDT 的性能？

items.capEn: Figure 5: Task definitions and visualizations. For 777 challenging tasks, we describe their language instruction, randomization, and definitions of each sub-task. For Pour Water-L-1/3 and Pour Water-R-2/3, we show the resulting water levels in two images.
items.capZh: 图 5：任务定义和可视化。对于 7 个具有挑战性的任务，我们描述了它们的语言指令、随机化和每个子任务的定义。对于 Pour Water-L-1/3 和 Pour Water-R-2/3，我们在两张图像中显示了最终的水位。

items.en: We select 777 challenging tasks to evaluate the generalizability and capabilities of RDT from different dimensions, including complex scenarios that the model may encounter in real-world tasks, such as various unseen elements and dexterous manipulation. An illustration of the dimension of each task is given in Table 1 while detailed definitions and visualizations are provided in Fig. 5.
items.zh: 我们选择了777个具有挑战性的任务，从不同维度评估RDT的泛化能力和性能，包括模型在真实世界任务中可能遇到的复杂场景，例如各种未见元素和灵巧操作。每个任务的维度说明见表1，详细定义和可视化见图5。

items.en: We use the pre-training and fine-tuning datasets in Sec. 4.2. We now list the number of demos related to each task in our fine-tuning dataset. Wash Cup: 133133133 demos for seen cups combined and 00 demos for unseen cups; Pour Water: 350350350 demos for seen rooms combined and 00 demos for unseen rooms; Pour Water-L-1/3 & Pour Water-R-2/3: 181818 demos for the water level of little, 191919 demos for half, and 191919 demos for full; Handover: 555 demos; Fold Shorts: 111 demo; Robot Dog: 686868 demos.
items.zh: 我们使用第4.2节中的预训练和微调数据集。现在列出微调数据集中与每个任务相关的演示数量。洗杯子：133133133个演示（组合的见过杯子）和00个演示（未见杯子）；倒水：350350350个演示（组合的见过房间）和00个演示（未见房间）；倒水-L-1/3和倒水-R-2/3：181818个演示（少量水位），191919个演示（一半水位），191919个演示（满水位）；交接：555个演示；折叠短裤：111个演示；机器狗：686868个演示。

items.en: Model Training and Inference. We scale the size of RDT up to 1.21.21.2B parameters, establishing it as the currently largest diffusion-based robotic foundation model. The model is pre-trained on 484848 H100 80GB GPUs for a month, giving a total of 111M training iteration steps. It takes three days to fine-tune this model using the same GPUs for 130130130K steps. We defer further details to App. F, including the running platform, design choices, and data augmentation techniques. For real-time inference, we adopt DPM-Solver++ (Lu et al., 2022), a recent sampling accelerator of diffusion models. It can reduce the diffusion steps required to sample an action chunk from 100100100 steps to 555 steps, achieving an action chunk inference frequency of 666 Hz (action chunks per second) and an average action inference frequency of 381381381 Hz (actions per second) on the target robot’s onboard RTX 4090 24GB GPU.
items.zh: 模型训练与推理。我们将RDT的规模扩展到1.21.21.2B参数，使其成为目前最大的基于扩散的机器人基础模型。该模型在484848块H100 80GB GPU上预训练了一个月，总计111M训练迭代步。使用相同的GPU微调该模型需要三天时间，共130130130K步。更多细节请参见附录F，包括运行平台、设计选择和数据增强技术。对于实时推理，我们采用DPM-Solver++（Lu等人，2022），这是一种最新的扩散模型采样加速器。它可以将采样一个动作块所需的扩散步数从100100100步减少到555步，在目标机器人的机载RTX 4090 24GB GPU上实现动作块推理频率666 Hz（每秒动作块数）和平均动作推理频率381381381 Hz（每秒动作数）。

items.en: Baselines. To comprehensively evaluate RDT, we consider the most advanced baselines in robotic foundation models and bimanual manipulation, including Action Chunking with Transformers (ACT) (Zhao et al., 2023), OpenVLA (Kim et al., 2024), and Octo (Ghosh et al., 2023). ACT is a state-of-the-art method in bimanual manipulation, which uses VAE to model the action distribution. OpenVLA is the largest open-source foundation model (7B), employing the discretization modeling. Octo is a diffusion-based foundation model, and its largest version has only 939393M parameters.
items.zh: 基线方法。为了全面评估RDT，我们考虑了机器人基础模型和双臂操作中最先进的基线方法，包括Action Chunking with Transformers（ACT）（Zhao等人，2023）、OpenVLA（Kim等人，2024）和Octo（Ghosh等人，2023）。ACT是双臂操作中的最先进方法，使用VAE对动作分布进行建模。OpenVLA是最大的开源基础模型（7B），采用离散化建模。Octo是一个基于扩散的基础模型，其最大版本仅有939393M参数。

items.en: We employ the success rate as our main metric, which is calculated by dividing successful trials by total trials. Wash Cup is tested with 888 trials for each cup (one seen cup, two unseen cups, 242424 trials in total). Pour Water is tested with 888 trials for each room (three unseen rooms, 242424 trials in total). Pour Water-L-1/3 and Pour Water-R-2/3 are tested with 888 trials each. Handover, Fold Shorts, and Robot Dog are tested with 252525 trials each. All the tests are performed on the ALOHA dual-arm robot (see App. G for hardware configurations). Experimental details, such as the implementation and hyper-parameters, are elaborated in App. H.
items.zh: 我们采用成功率作为主要指标，通过成功试验次数除以总试验次数计算。洗杯子每个杯子测试888次（一个见过杯子，两个未见杯子，共242424次试验）。倒水每个房间测试888次（三个未见房间，共242424次试验）。倒水-L-1/3和倒水-R-2/3各测试888次。交接、折叠短裤和机器狗各测试252525次。所有测试均在ALOHA双臂机器人上进行（硬件配置见附录G）。实验细节，如实现和超参数，详见附录H。

items.en: Answering 𝒬𝒬\mathcal{Q}5, we have conducted ablation studies on the model size, pre-training, and the modeling method to understand their importance. We consider the variants of: RDT (ours): the original RDT. RDT (regress): RDT without diffusion modeling. It models the deterministic mapping (ℓ,𝒐t)↦𝒂tmaps-toℓsubscript𝒐𝑡subscript𝒂𝑡(\ell,{\bm{o}}_{t})\mapsto{\bm{a}}_{t}. RDT (small): RDT without large parameters. It has only 166166166M parameters. RDT (scratch): RDT without pre-training. It is trained from scratch during fine-tuning. In Table 2, we evaluate these variants in terms of three dimensions of generalizability. Table 7 provides a comparison of different variants of RDT as well as baselines.
items.zh: 针对问题𝒬𝒬\mathcal{Q}5，我们对模型规模、预训练和建模方法进行了消融研究，以理解它们的重要性。我们考虑了以下变体：RDT（我们的）：原始RDT。RDT（回归）：无扩散建模的RDT。它建模确定性映射(ℓ,𝒐t)↦𝒂tmaps-toℓsubscript𝒐𝑡subscript𝒂𝑡(\ell,{\bm{o}}_{t})\mapsto{\bm{a}}_{t}。RDT（小）：无大参数的RDT。它仅有166166166M参数。RDT（从头训练）：无预训练的RDT。它在微调期间从头训练。在表2中，我们从泛化性的三个维度评估这些变体。表7提供了RDT不同变体以及基线方法的比较。

items.en: From the results in Table 3, we can see that RDT consistently outperforms other baselines. This is because RDT employs diffusion with a powerful network architecture to model the distribution of multi-modal actions accurately, while discretization and VAE lack accuracy and expressiveness, respectively. Besides, the large number of parameters after large-scale pre-training provides a lot of prior knowledge, which significantly improves the generalizability. Here is a detailed analysis:
items.zh: 从表3的结果可以看出，RDT始终优于其他基线方法。这是因为RDT采用扩散结合强大的网络架构来准确建模多模态动作的分布，而离散化和VAE分别缺乏准确性和表达能力。此外，大规模预训练后的大量参数提供了大量先验知识，显著提高了泛化能力。以下是详细分析：

items.en: 𝒬𝒬\mathcal{Q}1 & 𝒬𝒬\mathcal{Q}2: RDT can zero-shot generalize to unseen objects, scenes, and modalities. In Wash Cup and Pour Water, RDT can still achieve a high success rate on unseen scenarios, and its performance is not much different from that on seen ones. In contrast, the other baselines cannot even complete the entire task. In Pour Water-L-1/3 and Pour Water-R-2/3, from the third row of Fig. 5 or Fig. 10 (zoomed-in version), we can find that RDT understands precisely which hand to manipulate and how much water to pour and closely follows the instruction through its actions, even though it has never seen words like “one-third” or “two-thirds”. It is precisely because of large-scale pre-training that RDT has seen a large number of diverse objects, scenes, and instructions, leading to such strong zero-shot generalization.
items.zh: 问题𝒬𝒬\mathcal{Q}1和𝒬𝒬\mathcal{Q}2：RDT可以零样本泛化到未见物体、场景和模态。在洗杯子和倒水任务中，RDT在未见场景上仍能取得高成功率，其性能与见过场景相差不大。相比之下，其他基线方法甚至无法完成整个任务。在倒水-L-1/3和倒水-R-2/3中，从图5或图10（放大版）的第三行可以看出，RDT精确理解用哪只手操作以及倒多少水，并通过动作紧密遵循指令，尽管它从未见过“三分之一”或“三分之二”这样的词语。正是由于大规模预训练，RDT见过大量多样的物体、场景和指令，从而具有如此强大的零样本泛化能力。

items.en: 𝒬𝒬\mathcal{Q}3: RDT can learn new skills using only a few shots. In Handover and Fold Shorts, RDT has learned new and complex skills of handover and folding through few-shot learning, whose action patterns are very different from known skills, while the success rate of others is almost zero. Such improvement is also due to large-scale pre-training. Few-shot learning can help RDT quickly adapt to new working environments, which is of great significance for practical applications.
items.zh: 问题𝒬𝒬\mathcal{Q}3：RDT可以仅用少量样本学习新技能。在交接和折叠短裤任务中，RDT通过少样本学习学会了交接和折叠的新复杂技能，其动作模式与已知技能差异很大，而其他方法的成功率几乎为零。这种改进也归功于大规模预训练。少样本学习可以帮助RDT快速适应新的工作环境，这对实际应用具有重要意义。

items.en: 𝒬𝒬\mathcal{Q}4: RDT can handle dexterous tasks. In Robot Dog, RDT accurately controls the angle when pushing the joystick, while others have caused the robot dog to deviate. This is because diffusion, with our powerful network architecture, can model the distribution of multi-modal and nonlinear actions so that the action precision can meet the requirements of dexterous tasks. We also note that the joystick and the remote control are both black, making the joystick not visually apparent. It probably makes ACT prone to failure. In contrast, large-scale pre-training has made RDT learn a better vision-language representation of the joystick concept, improving the recognition capability.
items.zh: 问题𝒬𝒬\mathcal{Q}4：RDT可以处理灵巧任务。在机器狗任务中，RDT在推动操纵杆时精确控制角度，而其他方法导致机器狗偏离。这是因为扩散结合我们强大的网络架构可以建模多模态和非线性动作的分布，从而使动作精度满足灵巧任务的要求。我们还注意到，操纵杆和遥控器都是黑色的，使得操纵杆在视觉上不明显。这可能导致ACT容易失败。相比之下，大规模预训练使RDT学习了更好的操纵杆概念的视觉语言表示，提高了识别能力。

items.en: 𝒬𝒬\mathcal{Q}5: Large model size, extensive data, and diffusion are all essential factors for our excellence. In Table 2, there is a serious performance drop without any of these factors, demonstrating the necessity of our contributions. In particular, RDT (scratch) performs poorly on unseen objects and scenes, indicating that the knowledge from pre-training is critical for generalization.
items.zh: 问题𝒬𝒬\mathcal{Q}5：大模型规模、大量数据和扩散都是我们卓越表现的关键因素。在表2中，缺少任何这些因素都会导致性能严重下降，证明了我们贡献的必要性。特别是，RDT（从头训练）在未见物体和场景上表现不佳，表明预训练的知识对泛化至关重要。

items.en: In this paper, we tackled the challenges of data scarcity and increased manipulation complexity in generalizable bimanual manipulation by developing the Robotics Diffusion Transformer (RDT), a diffusion-based foundation model for language-conditioned visuomotor imitation learning. Our model was pre-trained on an extensive multi-robot dataset and fine-tuned on a self-collected bimanual dataset. We further introduce a Physically Interpretable Unified Action Space to unify action representations across different robots, enhancing robustness and transferability. Outperforming existing methods, RDT not only demonstrates significant improvements in dexterous bimanual capability and instruction following but also achieves remarkable performance in few-shot learning and zero-shot generalization to unseen objects and scenes.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们通过开发机器人扩散Transformer（RDT）——一种用于语言条件视觉运动模仿学习的基于扩散的基础模型——应对了可泛化双臂操作中的数据稀缺和操作复杂性增加的挑战。我们的模型在广泛的多机器人数据集上进行了预训练，并在自收集的双臂数据集上进行了微调。我们进一步引入了物理可解释统一动作空间，以统一不同机器人的动作表示，增强鲁棒性和可迁移性。优于现有方法，RDT不仅在灵巧双臂能力和指令遵循方面表现出显著改进，而且在少样本学习和零样本泛化到未见物体和场景方面取得了卓越性能。

items.en: All the data used in this research comes from open-source and well-documented datasets, and we strictly follow all applicable licensing and usage guidelines. Our finetuning dataset is collected by the authors of this paper along with some volunteers.
items.zh: 本研究中使用的所有数据均来自开源且文档完善的数据集，我们严格遵守所有适用的许可和使用指南。我们的微调数据集由本文作者及一些志愿者收集。

items.en: While RDT is a model trained for scalable, language-conditioned visuomotor policy learning and tested on the ALOHA dual-arm robot, we emphasize that any harmful use of our model is neither intended nor encouraged, and we encourage responsible deployment on real-world robots.
items.zh: 虽然RDT是一个为可扩展的、语言条件的视觉运动策略学习而训练的模型，并在ALOHA双臂机器人上进行了测试，但我们强调，任何对我们模型的有害使用都是无意且不被鼓励的，我们鼓励在真实世界机器人上负责任地部署。

items.en: To reproduce our pre-training and fine-tuning processes, we have provided the code in the supplementary materials. We also include instructions for downloading the dataset, how to use the training code, and a guide for deploying on a real machine in the README file. Once the paper is accepted, we will fully open-source all our code, model weights, and fine-tuning datasets.
items.zh: 为了复现我们的预训练和微调过程，我们在补充材料中提供了代码。我们还在README文件中包含了下载数据集的说明、如何使用训练代码以及在实际机器上部署的指南。论文被接收后，我们将完全开源所有代码、模型权重和微调数据集。

items.en: Please refer to App. D for pre-training dataset details, App. E for fine-tuning dataset details, App. F for RDT training details, App. G for hardware details, and App. H for experimental details and implementation of baselines.
items.zh: 预训练数据集详情请参见附录D，微调数据集详情请参见附录E，RDT训练详情请参见附录F，硬件详情请参见附录G，实验详情和基线实现请参见附录H。
